utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution contains all six of these items. Each item is checked for completeness: (1) property – includes type, price, and details (though missing precise address and school district info, it still fulfills 'details and price'); (2) financing – includes solution type and detailed terms (down payment, loan amount, interest rate, amortization period, monthly payment); (3) legal_services – includes service type and cost; (4) moving_services – includes arrangements and cost; (5) setup_services – includes utilities and cost; (6) total_budget – includes full cost breakdown with all relevant sub-items. All six are included and reasonably detailed according to the expected format.
